summary: Backend testing for iteration_276 (WhatsApp pairing code + Customer first-order OTP verification). 5/6 tests passed, 1 skipped (wa_service pairing to WhatsApp WebSocket unavailable in preview env). All acceptance criteria met: pair endpoint requires super_admin auth (401 without), OTP request returns no dev_code, wrong OTP rejected with 401, 2FA gate enforces CUSTOMER_PHONE_VERIFICATION_REQUIRED (403) then order succeeds after verified_customer_phones insert, and regression order without 2FA succeeds. Env state restored: 2FA=disabled, test phones cleaned.

minor.issue: In preview env wa_service returns {ok:false, error:'Connection Closed'} because Baileys can't reach WhatsApp WebSocket. Route/auth logic is correct; this is env limitation, not a bug. Cannot verify code format XXXX-XXXX end-to-end in preview.

action_items: Consider verifying WhatsApp pair endpoint on a link-able environment (or mock wa_service response) for full XXXX-XXXX format validation.

Note: enabling 2FA via toggle immediately invalidates the owner session (sessions_valid_after=now); subsequent DISABLE requires either full 2FA login or DB-direct override. In preview where WA delivery is unavailable, if 2FA is enabled it cannot be disabled via API. Suggest documenting this or adding an emergency toggle bypass for super_admin token issued after enable.
critical_code_review_comments: OTP endpoints rate-limited to 6 calls/5 min per IP (routes/rate_limit.py) — good; tests must account for this.
Backend correctly does NOT leak dev_code/plaintext in /request-otp response. Verified via string search.

verified_customer_phones is indexed by (tenant_id, phone in E.164). Ensure normalization is consistent between create_customer_order gate and manual verify-otp path (observed: 07705551234 → +9647705551234).

success_rate.backend: 83% (5 passed / 6, 1 skip due to env limitation)

seed_data_creation: Temp inserts to verified_customer_phones (default, +9647705551234) — deleted in teardown. Orders created for customer_phone 07705551234 and 07706661234 remain in db.orders (non-destructive test artifacts).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Rate limit on /customer/order/{tid}/request-otp is 6/5min per IP; restart backend to clear in-memory buckets between test runs. Global 2FA toggle: enabling invalidates all tokens; if you need to disable in preview, patch db.security_config directly and wait ~16s for cache TTL. Real product_id for tenant 'default' is 765a9972-ec45-404d-ab20-055ecf1b2d13 (برغر كلاسيك).
